'''zhanguyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:swabbing|swabbing]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ng-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swabbing|swabbing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhanguyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhængiyith|zhængiyith]] || [[word:zhængiyij|zhængiyij]] || [[word:zhængiyish|zhængiyish]] || [[word:zhængiyi|zhængiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhangunguyuth|zhangunguyuth]] || [[word:zhangunguyuj|zhangunguyuj]] || [[word:zhangunguyush|zhangunguyush]] || [[word:zhangunguyu|zhangunguyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhanguyuth|zhanguyuth]] || [[word:zhanguyuj|zhanguyuj]] || [[word:zhanguyush|zhanguyush]] || [[word:zhanguyu|zhanguyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhangufyuth|zhangufyuth]] || [[word:zhangufyuj|zhangufyuj]] || [[word:zhangufyush|zhangufyush]] || [[word:zhangufyuf|zhangufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhanguyuthu|zhanguyuthu]] || [[word:zhanguyuju|zhanguyuju]] || [[word:zhanguyushu|zhanguyushu]] || [[word:zhanguyuku|zhanguyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhanguyuth|zhanguyuth]] || [[word:zhanguyuj|zhanguyuj]] || [[word:zhanguyush|zhanguyush]] || [[word:zhanguyu|zhanguyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhanguyuthul|zhanguyuthul]] || [[word:zhanguyujul|zhanguyujul]] || [[word:zhanguyushul|zhanguyushul]] || [[word:zhanguyukul|zhanguyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhanguyuthuthu|zhanguyuthuthu]] || [[word:zhanguyujuju|zhanguyujuju]] || [[word:zhanguyushushu|zhanguyushushu]] || [[word:zhanguyuku|zhanguyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhanguyuthun|zhanguyuthun]] || [[word:zhanguyujun|zhanguyujun]] || [[word:zhanguyushun|zhanguyushun]] || [[word:zhanguyukun|zhanguyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhanguyuthuoro|zhanguyuthuoro]] || [[word:zhanguyujuoro|zhanguyujuoro]] || [[word:zhanguyushuoro|zhanguyushuoro]] || [[word:zhanguyukuoro|zhanguyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
